prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: SON-NPT288-TROWEL-BLK-3PK
Product Type: SHOVEL_SPADE
Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor
Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Pin Pointer Metal Detecting Hand Trowel Shovel with Depth Markers, 11 inch (3 Pack)
Description: The ASR Outdoor Metal Detector Hand Trowel is a very durable and reliable hand tool that is crafted from high abrasive ABS plastic which makes it not only strong and durable, but also lightweight and easy to use. The main benefit of using a non-metal hand trowel is that while it is a composite/plastic (no metal) design makes it great because you can use a pin pointer metal detector on the dirt that is still in the shovel without getting false positive readings from the metal detecting pin pointer.</br></br>The ideal use for this is for when metal detecting in the field to get scoops out of a dug hole and then swept with a pin pointer to determine if the object that the metal detector sounded off for is in the trowel. You can't do this with a metal trowel! Each trowel features a four inch measuring scale on the scoop so you can control the depth of your digging. This hand trowel is extremely versatile and can be used in multiple types of terrain including lawn and garden applications as well as tough desert bedrock. The plastic hand trowel also features a rubberized thumb grip handle that will ensure unmatched comfort and ease of use.
Search Terms: (none)
Features:
- NO FALSE POSITIVES: Constructed from ABS plastic composite (no metal) you can use a pin-pointer metal detector on the dirt that is still in the shovel without getting false positive readings from the metal detecting pin pointer
- DEPTH MARKER: Specially designed depth ruler is embossed into the face of the shovel pan; this will not wear off with normal use and will help control metered digging
- DURABILITY AND LONGEVITY: Made to stand up to daily use this handheld digging tool will do the job consistently well with you
- COMFORT AND EASE: The metal detector hand trowel features an ergonomic handle with rubber thumb grip that aides in the daily use of this tool
- MULTIPURPOSE: Ideal for planting, weeding, gardening while cutting through grass and measuring depth as a hand shovel while digging

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3-Pack 11in Black Metal Detecting Hand Trowel

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3-pk 11 in Black Metal Detecting Hand Trowel

anthropic.title_differentiation: No False Positives, ABS Plastic Composite, Depth Marker Scale, Ergonomic Rubber Grip, Multipurpose Digging

openai.title_differentiation: No False Positives, ABS Plastic, Depth Marker, Rubber Thumb Grip, Lightweight, Durable, Multipurpose
